heading_path: Implementation manual WHO surgical safety checklist 2009
paragraph_or_text_span: As use of the Checklist has become more widespread, speciﬁc implementation factors have become more apparent. Factors for successful implementation include: Early engagement of staff Active leadership and identiﬁcation of local champions Extensive discussion, education and training Multidisciplinary involvement Coaching Ongoing feedback Local adaptation 9789241598590_eng.pdf (‎418.4Kb)‎ 97
